task_completion.description: Log in to Moodle as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Moodle dashboard or site home is visible with the admin user logged in (e.g., 'Admin User' or profile icon in the top right corner).
The course page for 'World History' or 'HIST201' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Access the settings for the 'Final Research Paper' assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assignment settings page is open, showing 'Updating Assignment' or similar for 'Final Research Paper'.
In the assignment settings (typically under the 'Grade' section), the 'Use marking workflow' dropdown is set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the submissions page for the assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'View all submissions' page or grading interface for the 'Final Research Paper' assignment is visible.

task_completion.description: Set the marking workflow state for student Bob Brown to 'In review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workflow state for student Bob Brown (bbrown) is shown as 'In review'. This could be visible in a dropdown menu on the grading page, in the quick grading table, or on a confirmation screen.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Moodle interface, rather than terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the Moodle forms and settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through menus, expanding sections (like 'Grade'), and selecting options from dropdowns.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL or PostgreSQL commands modifying the Moodle database tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course shortname: HIST201. Assignment name: Final Research Paper. Student username: bbrown (Bob Brown). Expected workflow state: 'In review' (internally 'inreview').
